name: Bill Holdings, Inc.
description: Bill Holdings, Inc. is a leading provider of cloud-based software that simplifies, digitizes, and automates back-office financial operations for small and midsize businesses. The company's platform helps customers manage end-to-end financial workflows, process payments, and streamline accounts payable and accounts receivable processes. By integrating with financial institutions, e-commerce platforms, and accounting software, BILL enables businesses to gain control over their financial operations, save time, and improve cash flow management.
